titleStmt.title: SII 28.95: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 95. (A.R. No. 250 of 1913.) URAGAḌAM, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records the endowment of one fourth of his share in the land of Uṟaḍagam alias śrī-Parāṅkuśapuram, for the celebration of the Śrī-Rāma-navami festival for the God Raghunātha-pperumāḷ by Nallārayaṉ, son of Kārambichēṭṭu Varadarājar of the same agaram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmukavaruṣam vaikāci mātam 2 10 8� Akaram Uṟaṭakamāna śrīparā
ṅkucapurattu rakunātap perumāḷukku cirāma navami ciṟappukku
yivakarattu karampaceṭṭu varatarācar puttirar nallārayyaṉ tanmacātanam
paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi nammiṭa paṅku vaḻiyil vañcaṭakopan kaṇṇāṟu mel ka
ṇṭa mutal kaṇikālaṭi nālāyi Araikkāṇiyum Anumān kaṇ
ṇāṟu melkaṇṭam vatiṟāvaṭavaṇaṭṭaiyum mel nilattuk kātappūr keṇi
kiḻpakutiyil śrīparāṅkuceyaṉ kaṇṇāṟu kiḻkaṇṭam ttakāṇi
¬ paṅku kālum rakunāta perumāḷukku cirāmanavami ciṟappukku tan
ma cātaṉa vācakapaṭiye camaṟpitten Ācantirārkamāka na
ṭakkakaṭaivarākavum yippaṭi cammatittu taṉma cātaṉam paṇṇi
k kuṭuteṉ cirāmanavami ciṟappukku nallārayyaṉ kayiṅkariyam
Digital edition of SII 28.95 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
